import logging

import pandas as pd

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def run_feature_pipeline(source_path: str, dest_path: str) -> bool:
    try:
        df = pd.read_csv(source_path)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        logger.error("Source file not found: %s", source_path)
        return False

    try:
        df["timestamp"] = pd.to_datetime(df["timestamp"])
        df["hour"] = df["timestamp"].dt.hour
        df["is_weekend"] = df["timestamp"].dt.dayofweek >= 5
        df = df.dropna(subset=["user_id"])
        df["revenue_bucket"] = pd.cut(
            df["revenue"], bins=[0, 10, 50, 100, float("inf")]
        )
        df = df.groupby("user_id").agg(
            total_revenue=("revenue", "sum"),
            session_count=("session_id", "nunique"),
        ).reset_index()
    except (KeyError, ValueError) as exc:
        logger.error("Pipeline transformation failed: %s", exc)
        return False

    try:
        df.to_parquet(dest_path, index=False)
    except OSError as exc:
        logger.error("Failed to write output: %s", exc)
        return False

    logger.info("Pipeline completed: %d rows written to %s", len(df), dest_path)
    return True
